name: aqa-cypress
description: Cypress test project created for automation homework

scripts.cy:run: rimraf allure-results allure-report && cypress run --browser chrome
scripts.cy:run:qauto: rimraf allure-results allure-report && cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.qauto.config.js
scripts.cy:run:qauto2: rimraf allure-results allure-report && cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.qauto2.config.js
scripts.cy:report:allure: npm run cy:run && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.cy:run:mochawesome: rimraf mochawesome-report && cypress run --browser chrome --reporter mochawesome --reporter-options reportDir=mochawesome-report,overwrite=false,html=false,json=true
scripts.cy:run:qauto:mochawesome: rimraf mochawesome-report && cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.qauto.config.js --reporter mochawesome --reporter-options reportDir=mochawesome-report,overwrite=false,html=false,json=true
scripts.cy:run:qauto2:mochawesome: rimraf mochawesome-report && cypress run --browser chrome --config-file cypress.qauto2.config.js --reporter mochawesome --reporter-options reportDir=mochawesome-report,overwrite=false,html=false,json=true
scripts.cy:report:mochawesome: npm run cy:run:mochawesome && npm run mocha:merge && npm run mocha:generate
